free_text: Study of internal structures of 9,10Be and 10B in
scattering of 4He from 9Be.
same data as in prev.ref.
two telescopes each consisting of
Si-Si(Li) detectors with thicknesses of 100 mum and
3 mm, respectively, were used.
The self-supporting Be target was prepared from a 99%
pure thin foil of beryllium. The target thickness was
7 mum. Peaks due to carbon and oxygen contaminations
were not observed in the energy spectra.
.No information on source of uncertainty
Table data was received from Dr.E.Voskoboynik
.By Dr.E.Voskoboynik
S.B
.Table data was received
SD: Entry revised according to add.ref.
PPN/L,12,703. Subent 002 splitted in two. Data in
Subent 003 corrected. Additional data received
from Dr. A.S.Denikin were added.
Dr. Denikin (2018-03-12): On figure scale marks of the
ordinate axis must be divided on ten for the 9Be
excited states data at 6.76 and 11.28 MeV.
SD: Part of data (elastic scat.) moved to
Subent O2194.006. COMMENT added.
Data received from Dr.A.S.Denikin (2018-12-03).
SD: Data at 7.37 and 9.4 MeV were replaced.
Corrected data were received from Dr.A.S.Denikin.
Data at B-10 excited states: 0.; 0.72; 1.74;
3.59 and 5.15 MeV were received from Dr.A.S.Denikin
